{{BattleDialogue |Hello, youngster! I think I've heard of you before. Lance is your father, right? Well, I'm the Gym Leader around these parts. If you defeat me, I'll hand over the Blaze Badge. Let's do this! |The fire in my Pokémon's fighting spirit has been reduced to mere embers. You are truly worthy of this badge! |''Obtained the Blaze Badge!]'' Here's a bonus TM for you! ''[Prism received TM38!]'' TM38 contains Fire Blast! It's a burning hot fire move that has a chance to burn the opponent. It's immensely strong, just like you and your father are.
''On speaking again:''
If you're looking for more of a challenge, the airport might be able to take you to [[Mystery Zone|a place with stronger Trainers]]. You'll need [[Mystery Tckt|a special ticket]] to get there, though.
